hero.subtitle: Create a round, invite friends to propose movies, vote together.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to organize the perfect movie night with your friends.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Give the group a name and invite your friends
howItWorks.step2Desc: Everyone proposes the movies they want to watch
howItWorks.step3Desc: Everyone votes for their favourite. The best one wins
howItWorks.step4Desc: The winning movie becomes the group's choice

why.title: Why CineForum
why.subtitle: Because movie nights should be fun, not a battle.
why.feature1Desc: No leader dictatorship. The group chooses the movie, everyone votes equally.
why.feature2Desc: No fights about which movie to watch. The voting system is transparent and fair.
why.feature3Desc: An app made only for choosing movies with friends. No distractions.
